rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0001
rows.name: What's wrong? Are you in trouble?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0002
rows.name: Try talking to Tatsu, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0003
rows.name: Kyaaa[ST:wide ]― Aliens, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0004
rows.name:
And they brought Nopon takeout,
carrying him like a packed lunch, eh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0005
rows.name:
How rude, mo! Tatsu is
not a packed lunch, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0006
rows.name: These Earthlings are Tatsu's assistants, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0007
rows.name: Assistants?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0008
rows.name: Er, no! Assis... assisting... FRIENDS, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0009
rows.name:
Friends? Then that species
isn't related to Growth, no?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0010
rows.name: Sorry to startle you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0011
rows.name:
We are Earthlings. We are currently
hostile toward Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0012
rows.name:
Hostile toward Growth? Then it seems
like you'll become our allies, jan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0013
rows.name: We are Ma-non people, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0014
rows.name:
As you can see, since we possess culture and
high intelligence, we're targeted by Growth, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0015
rows.name:
You guys will help us, right?!
Surely you will, right?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0016
rows.name:
Right. If there's anything
we can do to help...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0017
rows.name:
You can, you can, yo! You
are our saviors, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0018
rows.name: This is where we are now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0019
rows.name:
Beneath the fog at the bottom of this
crevasse, there's a spaceship, y'know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0022
rows.name:
But Growth's anti-aircraft weapons
have us targeted, so we can't move![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0023
rows.name:
So if we destroy those anti-air weapons,
your spaceship can take off, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0024
rows.name:
Yes, yo! Growth's anti-air weapons are
installed at these three locations![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0025
rows.name: Please destroy them all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0026
rows.name:
Understood. We're not thrilled about them
controlling the airspace either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0027
rows.name: We'd like to take them out quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05060100_MSG0028
rows.name: You'll do it!? You guys are so kind![ST:wait ]
